name: Immunohistochemistry on Paraffin Sections (IHC-P)

note.en: 4–5 µm FFPE on positively charged slides (Superfrost Plus). Ensures adhesion & melts paraffin.
note.zh: 4–5 µm FFPE 切片贴附于正电荷载玻片（Superfrost Plus）。确保贴附并熔化石蜡。

components.name: 2. Deparaffinize: 3 × 5 min xylene → rehydrate: 100% EtOH × 2 → 95% → 70% → ddH₂O × 2

note.en: Each step 5 min. Fume hood for xylene.
note.zh: 每步 5 min。二甲苯需在通风橱操作。

note.en: Citrate pH 6.0 (citrate_buffer_ar): most cytoplasmic/ER antigens. EDTA pH 9.0 (ar_edta_ph9): nuclear/membrane antigens. Pressure cooker (15 psi, 3–4 min) or water bath (98°C, 20 min). Cool 20 min RT.
note.zh: 柠檬酸 pH 6.0（citrate_buffer_ar）：多数胞质/内质网抗原。EDTA pH 9.0（ar_edta_ph9）：核/膜抗原。高压锅（15 psi，3–4 min）或水浴（98°C，20 min）。RT 冷却 20 min。

components.name: 4. Block endogenous peroxidase: 3% H₂O₂ in PBS, 10–15 min RT

note.en: Prevents background from blood/liver peroxidases. Rinse 3× PBS.
note.zh: 防止血液/肝脏内源性过氧化物酶背景。PBS 冲洗 3 次。

components.name: 5. Block: 5–10% normal serum (same species as secondary Ab) in TBS, 1 h RT

note.en: Do NOT wash after — aspirate excess, apply primary Ab directly. Optional: avidin/biotin block if using ABC system.
note.zh: 封闭后不洗——吸去多余血清直接加一抗。ABC 系统需先做 avidin/biotin 封闭。

components.name: 6. Primary Ab: diluted in TBS + 1% BSA; 1 h RT or 4°C overnight (humidity chamber)

note.en: Typical 1:100–1:1000. PAP pen barrier. 4°C overnight often gives better S/N.
note.zh: 通常 1:100–1:1000 稀释。PAP 笔画疏水圈。4°C 过夜通常信噪比更好。

note.en: Polymer-based (EnVision+, Dako) preferred over biotin-streptavidin (less background). Species-matched.
note.zh: 聚合物法（EnVision+，Dako）优于生物素-链霉亲和素（更低背景）。种属匹配。

components.name: 10. DAB development: apply DAB + H₂O₂, 2–10 min RT; monitor under microscope; stop in ddH₂O

note.en: Brown = positive signal. Do not over-develop. Fresh DAB only.
note.zh: 棕色 = 阳性信号。勿过度显色。DAB 需新鲜配制。

components.name: 11. Counterstain: Hematoxylin 1–5 min → differentiate in acid-alcohol → blue in running water 5 min

note.en: Harris or Mayer's Hematoxylin. Blue in tap water or Scott's Water (2 g MgSO₄ + 0.2 g NaHCO₃/L).
note.zh: Harris 或 Mayer 苏木精。自来水返蓝或 Scott's 水（2 g MgSO₄ + 0.2 g NaHCO₃/L）。

note.en: Each 2–5 min. Avoid air bubbles. Cure 24 h before imaging.
note.zh: 每步 2–5 min。避免气泡。封片后 24 h 再镜检。

notes.en: Controls: (1) positive tissue; (2) isotype control replacing primary Ab; (3) H&E on sequential section. Scoring: H-score = intensity(0–3) × %positive. Quantitative: QuPath/HALO software. For multiplex: Opal tyramide system (TSA amplification).
notes.zh: 对照：(1) 阳性组织；(2) 同型对照替代一抗；(3) 相邻切片 H&E。评分：H-score = 强度(0–3) × 阳性率。定量：QuPath/HALO 图像分析。多重免疫组化：Opal tyramide 系统（TSA 信号放大）。

ref: Ramos-Vara & Miller (2014) Vet Pathol 51:42–87; Taylor & Rudbeck (2013) Dako Education Guide; Shi et al. (1991) J Histochem Cytochem 39:741

materials.name: FFPE tissue sections on charged slides
Antigen retrieval buffer (citrate pH 6.0 or EDTA pH 9.0)
HRP-conjugated secondary antibody or polymer detection system

usage.en: Detect protein expression in paraffin-embedded tissue sections using immunohistochemistry.
usage.zh: 免疫组化检测石蜡包埋组织切片中的蛋白表达。

briefSteps.en: Bake FFPE sections → deparaffinize in xylene → rehydrate through graded ethanol → heat-induced antigen retrieval → block endogenous peroxidase with 3% H₂O₂ → serum block → primary antibody overnight at 4°C → wash → HRP-polymer secondary antibody → DAB chromogen development → hematoxylin counterstain → dehydrate → mount.
briefSteps.zh: 烘烤 FFPE 切片 → 二甲苯脱蜡 → 梯度乙醇复水 → 热修复抗原 → 3% H₂O₂ 封闭内源性过氧化物酶 → 血清封闭 → 4°C 孵育一抗过夜 → 洗涤 → HRP 聚合物二抗 → DAB 显色 → 苏木精复染 → 脱水 → 封片。

detailedSteps.en: Bake 4–5 µm FFPE sections on positively charged slides (e.g., Superfrost Plus) in a 60°C oven for 1 h to melt paraffin and improve tissue adhesion.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 4–5 µm FFPE 切片（贴于 Superfrost Plus 正电荷载玻片）置于 60°C 烤箱中 1 h，熔化石蜡并增强组织贴附。

detailedSteps.en: Deparaffinize in xylene: 3 × 5 min. Rehydrate through graded ethanol in fume hood: 100% EtOH × 2 → 95% EtOH → 70% EtOH → ddH₂O × 2, each step 5 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 通风橱内二甲苯脱蜡：3 × 5 min。梯度乙醇复水：100% EtOH × 2 → 95% EtOH → 70% EtOH → 蒸馏水 × 2，每步 5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Heat-induced epitope retrieval (HIER): submerge slides in antigen retrieval buffer (citrate pH 6.0 for cytoplasmic antigens; EDTA pH 9.0 for nuclear/membrane antigens). Heat in water bath at 98°C for 20 min or pressure cooker at 15 psi for 3–4 min. Cool to room temperature for 20 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 热修复表位（HIER）：将载玻片浸入抗原修复缓冲液（胞质抗原用柠檬酸 pH 6.0；核/膜抗原用 EDTA pH 9.0）。水浴 98°C 加热 20 min 或高压锅 15 psi 3–4 min。室温冷却 20 min。

detailedSteps.en: Block endogenous peroxidase: incubate sections in 3% H₂O₂ in PBS for 10–15 min at room temperature. Rinse 3 × 2 min in TBS.
detailedSteps.zh: 封闭内源性过氧化物酶：PBS 中 3% H₂O₂ 室温孵育 10–15 min。TBS 冲洗 3 × 2 min。

detailedSteps.en: Draw a hydrophobic barrier around each section with a PAP pen. Block non-specific binding with 5–10% normal serum (same species as secondary antibody) in TBS for 1 h at room temperature in a humidity chamber. Aspirate excess, do not wash.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 PAP 笔在切片周围画疏水圈。在湿盒中用 TBS 中 5–10% 正常血清（与二抗同种属）室温封闭 1 h。吸去多余封闭液，不要洗涤。

detailedSteps.en: Apply primary antibody diluted in TBS + 1% BSA (typical dilution 1:100–1:1000, per datasheet). Incubate overnight at 4°C in a sealed humidity chamber. 4°C overnight generally gives better signal-to-noise than 1 h at RT.
detailedSteps.zh: 在 TBS + 1% BSA 中稀释一抗（参考说明书，通常 1:100–1:1000）。在密封湿盒中 4°C 孵育过夜。4°C 过夜通常比室温 1 h 信噪比更好。

detailedSteps.en: Wash sections 3 × 5 min in TBS or TBST on a rocker. Do not allow sections to dry at any point.
detailedSteps.zh: 在摇床上 TBS 或 TBST 洗涤 3 × 5 min。任何时候不要让切片干燥。

detailedSteps.en: Apply species-matched HRP-polymer secondary antibody (e.g., Dako EnVision+) undiluted or at manufacturer-recommended concentration. Incubate 30–60 min at room temperature.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入种属匹配的 HRP 聚合物二抗（如 Dako EnVision+），按说明书浓度或直接使用。室温孵育 30–60 min。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare fresh DAB chromogen per kit instructions. Apply DAB + H₂O₂ substrate to sections and monitor color development under a light microscope. Develop for 2–10 min (positive signal = brown precipitate). Stop reaction immediately by rinsing in ddH₂O.
detailedSteps.zh: 按试剂盒说明新鲜配制 DAB 显色液。将 DAB + H₂O₂ 底物加至切片上，在光学显微镜下监控显色。显色 2–10 min（阳性信号 = 棕色沉淀）。立即用蒸馏水冲洗终止反应。

detailedSteps.en: Counterstain nuclei with hematoxylin (Harris or Mayer's) for 1–5 min. Differentiate in 1% acid-alcohol (1% HCl in 70% EtOH) for 5–10 seconds. Blue nuclei by rinsing in running tap water for 5 min or Scott's Water (2 g/L MgSO₄ + 0.2 g/L NaHCO₃).
detailedSteps.zh: 苏木精（Harris 或 Mayer's）复染细胞核 1–5 min。在 1% 酸性乙醇（70% EtOH 中 1% HCl）中分化 5–10 秒。自来水冲洗 5 min 或 Scott's 水（2 g/L MgSO₄ + 0.2 g/L NaHCO₃）返蓝。

detailedSteps.en: Dehydrate: 70% → 95% EtOH × 2 → 100% EtOH × 2 → xylene × 2, each 2–5 min. Mount coverslip with xylene-based medium (DPX or Permount) using minimal medium to avoid bubbles. Allow to cure 24 h before imaging.
detailedSteps.zh: 脱水：70% → 95% EtOH × 2 → 100% EtOH × 2 → 二甲苯 × 2，每步 2–5 min。用少量二甲苯封固剂（DPX 或 Permount）封片，避免气泡。封片后 24 h 再进行显微镜成像。

note.en: Deparaffinized and rehydrated slides can be kept in 1× PBS at room temperature for up to 1 hour before proceeding to antigen retrieval.
note.zh: 脱蜡复水后的载玻片可在室温 1× PBS 中保存最多 1 h，之后再进行抗原修复。

note.en: Sections with primary antibody applied are incubated overnight at 4°C as a standard step — this is the intended safe stop between Day 1 and Day 2.
note.zh: 加了一抗的切片 4°C 孵育过夜是标准流程——这是第一天和第二天之间的预设暂停点。
